jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Shadowfax
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shadowfax. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
